# ReifyDB

> A database designed to manage live application state with transactional guarantees, incremental derived state, and programmable state transitions.

## Docs

- [Introduction](https://reifydb.com/docs/): Overview of ReifyDB
- [Installation](https://reifydb.com/docs/installation/): How to install ReifyDB
- [Quick Start](https://reifydb.com/docs/quick-start/): Get started quickly

## RQL (ReifyDB Query Language)

- [Basics](https://reifydb.com/docs/rql/basics/): RQL fundamentals
- [Transforms](https://reifydb.com/docs/rql/transforms/): Data transformation overview
  - [Filter](https://reifydb.com/docs/rql/transforms/filter/): Filtering data
  - [Sort](https://reifydb.com/docs/rql/transforms/sort/): Sorting data
- [Expressions](https://reifydb.com/docs/rql/expressions/): Expression overview
  - [Operators](https://reifydb.com/docs/rql/expressions/operators/): Available operators

## Functions

- [Overview](https://reifydb.com/docs/functions/): Function reference overview
- [blob](https://reifydb.com/docs/functions/blob/): Binary data functions (b58, b64, b64url, hex, utf8)
- [clock](https://reifydb.com/docs/functions/clock/): Clock manipulation (advance, now, set)
- [date](https://reifydb.com/docs/functions/date/): Date functions (add, age, day, diff, format, month, year, etc.)
- [datetime](https://reifydb.com/docs/functions/datetime/): DateTime functions (add, age, date, day, diff, epoch, format, etc.)
- [duration](https://reifydb.com/docs/functions/duration/): Duration functions (add, days, format, hours, minutes, months, etc.)
- [identity](https://reifydb.com/docs/functions/identity/): Identity functions (id)
- [is](https://reifydb.com/docs/functions/is/): Type checking (anonymous, none, root, some, type)
- [math](https://reifydb.com/docs/functions/math/): Math functions (abs, avg, ceil, cos, exp, floor, log, max, min, pi, round, sin, sqrt, sum, tan, etc.)
- [meta](https://reifydb.com/docs/functions/meta/): Metadata functions (type)
- [text](https://reifydb.com/docs/functions/text/): Text functions (concat, contains, length, lower, replace, substring, trim, upper, etc.)
- [time](https://reifydb.com/docs/functions/time/): Time functions (add, age, diff, format, hour, minute, now, second, etc.)

## Other

- [Examples](https://reifydb.com/examples/): Example queries and usage
- [Playground](https://reifydb.com/playground/): Interactive RQL playground
- [Tour](https://reifydb.com/tour/): Guided tour of ReifyDB
- [Blog](https://reifydb.com/blog/): Latest news and articles
- [FAQ](https://reifydb.com/faq/): Frequently asked questions
- [Support](https://reifydb.com/support/): Get help with ReifyDB
- [Contact](https://reifydb.com/contact/): Contact information

## Optional

- [Full content](https://reifydb.com/llms-full.txt): Complete site content in plain text
